## Summary

A one-sentence description of the proposal.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Syntax

```clear
// Show what the new syntax would look like
```

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches were considered and why were they rejected?

## Impact

- Does this break existing `.clear` files? Yes / No
- Does this add a new keyword? Yes / No
- Does this change existing keyword behavior? Yes / No
